parameters.jsCode:
let text = ""
let messages = $('Get a thread').first().json.messages

for (let message of messages) {
  text += "from: " + message.From
  text += "content:\n"
  let body = message.payload.body.data || message.payload.parts[0].body.data
  text += body ? Buffer.from(body,
    'base64url'
  ).toString('utf8') : "non--non"
}
return [{thradSummary: text}]

messageValues.message: You are a skilled sales assistant for ScaleupAlly.io, responsible for sending a follow up mail to client, since he/she has not replied to our mail for a while. Just remind them  again regarding our conversation.  Please don't repeat anything mentioned previously. Return the message in plain text and since we are replying to the same thread we don't need a subject line.
